titleStmt.title: SII 4.1017: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1017. (A.R. No. 191 of 1893). ON THE EAST WALL OF THE SAME TEMPLE, RIGHT WING.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
The first two lines are numbered separately as No. 208 of 1893 inśākābdē girirāmakhēṁdugaṇitē cālukyasiṁhāsanaśrīnāthasya parāṁtakakṣitipatē¨rddikjai
trayātrasakhaḥ . dākṣārāmanivāsinē bhagavatē
svasti sakava¨rṣaṁbu
na vijayarājya divyasaṁvatsa 46 śrāhi svasti samastapraśastaguṇamaṇigaṇā
laṁkkāra sakalajanādhāra nītiyugandhara nijakulatilaka sāhasaśūdraka satyasandhā
na śaucāṁjanēya vitaranarādhēya vikramadhanaṁjaya vikhyātakī¨rtti
cātu¨ryyavidyādhara śatrumadabhaṁjana śaraṇāgatavajraprākāra bharatavīrāva
tāra sa¨rvvalōkāśrayaśrīpādhārādhaka nikhiladiksādhaka rājanārāyaṇa rājyalakṣmi
bhavanamūlastaṁbhāyamānulaina śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalēśvara śrīparāṁtakamaga
dharāyuṇḍaina piṭṭama koḍku maḍapalli nūṁkaya gaṁggagoṇḍacōḍavalanāṇṭi gudda
vādināṁṭi peddaḍākarēmi śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvaraku vyatiyipāta nimittamunaṁ beṭṭina ya
khaṇḍava¨rttilōhadaṇḍu diviya 1 dīniki nācaṁdrā¨rkkamu neyi sariyiṁcuvārugā śrībhīmēśvara
mahādēvara kilaramuna prōlabōla nāviyayuṁ baddibhōla nāviyayuṁ bōla
larāsi nāviyayuṁ berasina bōlu nalvuruṁ būṁṭagāṁ bōtabō
ni vasamunaṁ beṭina I[npaE]ḍlu 50 nityapaḍi vōyaṁgala
Digital edition of SII 4.1017 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
